overview: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna), established in 2008, is an Institute of National Importance known for its strong focus on engineering, technology, and research. It has rapidly grown in reputation with consistent performance in academics, placements, and innovation.
accreditation: Institute of National Importance (INI); NIRF Overall 2024: 34th; NIRF Overall 2024: 73rd.

As per IIT norms. Stipend benefits for GATE-qualified students. Additional charges applicable.

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on national-level entrance exams followed by JoSAA (for B.Tech) and COAP (for M.Tech) counseling.
admissions.importantDates: Follows JoSAA/COAP schedule and IIT Patna academic calendar.
